meta.title: Murmli – Free AI Calorie Counter, Shopping List & Meal Planner
meta.description: Free AI calorie counter by Murmli: Calculate calories, create smart shopping lists, and have your weekly meal plan ready in minutes with the AI recipe planner.
meta.keywords: Free calorie counter, AI calorie calculator, shopping list app, AI recipe planner, calculate calories, weekly meal plan, Murmli
meta.og_title: Murmli – Free AI Calorie Counter & Meal Planner

schema.website_description: Murmli is your personal all-in-one app: Individual meal planning, recipe management, calorie counting, and workout plans, powered by an AI that adapts to you!

faq.q: Is the Murmli calorie counter really free?
faq.a: Yes, the calorie calculator on the website and in the app is permanently free. You calculate and save your requirements at no cost.

faq.q: Does the AI also automatically create my shopping list?
faq.a: Murmli generates an organized shopping list from recipe requests or the weekly plan and adjusts quantities to meet your calorie goal.

faq.q: Can I filter the AI recipe planner by allergies and macros?
faq.a: You can set preferences such as lactose-free, under 600 kcal, or at least 30g of protein and receive matching recipes with nutritional information.

howto.name: How to calculate calorie requirements with the Murmli calculator
howto.description: How to use the free Murmli AI calorie counter in 60 seconds.

steps.name: Enter basic data
steps.text: Enter gender, weight, height, and year of birth.

steps.name: Select work PAL
steps.text: Select working hours per week and the appropriate PAL value to reflect your occupational energy expenditure.

steps.name: Set leisure PAL
steps.text: Provide the PAL for leisure time so Murmli can fully calculate your total energy expenditure.

steps.name: View calorie goal
steps.text: Click on "Calculate calorie requirement" and read the suggested target ranges for weight loss, maintenance, or muscle building.

hero.h1: Free AI Calorie Counter with Smart Shopping List
hero.p: Want to calculate calories for free, plan recipes, and get an automatic shopping list? Murmli does it in one step: AI-calculated calorie needs, matching weekly plans, and an organized list for the supermarket.
hero.app_store_alt: Download now on the Apple App Store

trailer.p: Watch our short trailer and discover the most important features at a glance.

features.h2: What does Murmli do for you immediately?

items.p: Calculate basal and total metabolic rate using the Mifflin-St-Jeor formula and let the AI convert your goals into calories – no paywall.
Murmli creates an organized shopping list directly from your weekly plan and adjusts quantities to match your calorie goals.
Simply type a request like “lactose-free pasta under 600 kcal” and receive matching recipes with nutritional values and cooking steps.
Combine breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks into a clear weekly plan tailored to your calorie budget.
Get suggestions that take your progress into account and balance your energy level.
Save favorite dishes, adjust ingredients for allergies, and instantly see calories, proteins, and more.

how_to.h2: How do I calculate my calorie requirements?
how_to.p: Follow these short steps, and Murmli will immediately show you your basal metabolic rate, total energy expenditure, and suitable calorie goals.
steps: Enter gender, weight, height, and year of birth.
Select working hours and the appropriate PAL value.
Choose your leisure PAL, tap “Calculate calorie requirement,” and save the result.
Store the value in the app with one tap so recipes, shopping lists, and training are adjusted.
how_to.cta: Fill out the calorie calculator now

about.h2: Why is Murmli more than just a shopping list?
about.p1: Murmli links shopping lists, calorie calculators, and recipe planners in one app. You can share lists with family or partners, and everything stays synced in real-time.
about.p2: The AI recipe planner provides suggestions based on your criteria and sends ingredients directly to the list with one tap. In the recipe management, you get clear steps plus nutritional values.
about.p3: Calorie counter and calorie calculator work together: Cooked meals are logged, goals are updated, and training plans are adjusted accordingly.
about.p4: Result: a consistent nutrition ecosystem from shopping to tracking that constantly adapts to your goals.

calculator.h2: How does the Murmli calculator determine your calorie needs?
calculator.p: It combines the Mifflin-St-Jeor formula with your PAL values for work and leisure, instantly showing basal and total metabolic rates for weight loss, maintenance, or muscle building.
calculator.rest_pal_label: PAL value for leisure and rest
calculator.hint: Note: The calculator does not replace individual medical advice.
calculator.initial_result: Enter your data to receive an immediate evaluation of your basal and total metabolic rate.
calculator.info_h3: Why the Murmli calculator is precise
info_list: Uses the scientifically established Mifflin-St-Jeor approach for basal metabolic rate.
Considers your personal weekly rhythm via working and resting times.
Calculates target ranges for weight loss, maintenance, and muscle building just like in the app.
calculator.formula_explanation: Murmli combines the result with your specified working and resting times (PAL values) to calculate your total metabolic rate transparently.
calculator.formula_result_explanation: After calculation, you will see basal metabolic rate, occupational metabolic rate, and total metabolic rate including the recommended calorie goals. This allows you to directly assess whether your current nutrition plan fits your goal.
calculator.formula_tip: Tip: Save your values in the Murmli app to automatically sync meals, recipes, and training plans with your calorie balance.

faq_section.h2: Frequently asked questions about the free Murmli calorie counter

items.h3: Is the Murmli calorie counter really free?
items.p: Yes. The calculator on this page and in the app is permanently free. You pay nothing to calculate your calorie needs or save results.

items.h3: Does the AI also automatically create my shopping list?
items.p: Yes. Murmli instantly generates an organized shopping list from recipe requests or the weekly plan and adjusts quantities to your calorie goal.

items.h3: Can I filter the AI recipe planner by allergies and macros?
items.p: You can enter preferences like “lactose-free”, “under 600 kcal”, or “at least 30g protein”. The AI provides matching recipes with nutritional values and cooking steps.
